detail: Built status MATRIX (STATUS-MATRIX.md) + HTML dashboard + drift guard; run_gates.sh + pre-commit enforcer; honest tracker reset (139 overstatements cleared)
Verified Homebrew openjdk@21 (anchor) + openjdk@25 (forward) drive Maven via JAVA_HOME; no human install blocker
mvn -Pquality verify -> BUILD SUCCESS; 14 tests; Checkstyle 0 / SpotBugs 0; installed to local repo
catalog/payment/order services green; 14 tests incl. real-HTTP e2e; Checkstyle 0 / SpotBugs 0 (reviewed EI_EXPOSE_REP2 suppression on injected ports)
Capstones: shared-platform + capstone 01 commerce-checkout (microservices, green)
auto-mode classifier blocked direct push to main (feature-branch+PR discipline); commits remain local
account/ledger/transfer green; 12 tests incl. real-HTTP e2e; double-entry balance-or-reject + overdraft + idempotency; Checkstyle 0 / SpotBugs 0

mvn -Pquality verify -> BUILD SUCCESS across 17 modules; 0 Checkstyle violations, 0 SpotBugs bugs
Rewrote for the 3-capstone microservice layout (superseding single 99_capstone_*); per-capstone READMEs + capstones/README.md
Capstones: add fintech-ledger + logistics-fulfil; wire reactor; update strategy docs
Built the audit-log system (requested last session, missed in compaction); backfilled this session's milestones; PostToolUse hook staged pending user authorization for auto-capture of every action
